creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
There have been quite a lot of similar-looking upstream bugs, but without a reproducible test case, it is hard to say if the problem is fixable.

Is there any way to get at a (preprocessed) version of the file that the parser crashes on?  E.g. you could attempt to run:

clang -cc1 -fsyntax-only

on the file in question.
